title: One email/notification sent to the assigned person listing every item on the board they are assigned to

posts.author: sav.thornburgh (Savannah Thornburgh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
We purchased Monday.com primarily for the automated emails. When we have people assigned to several items, the automated email/notification is sending them one email/notification per item assigned, flooding their inbox. We need a way to send one email with every item needing attention listed from that board.
